message:
fix(a11y): improve accessibility in ActiveFilterChips component

- Add proper ReactNode import instead of using React.ReactNode
- Add separate ariaLabel prop for better screen reader experience
  (avoids including literal quote characters in aria-labels)
- Add focus-visible ring styles for keyboard navigation visibility
- Add aria-label to "Clear all" button for clarity

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
